headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -83.6)
key_insights: Fears trending up 255% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 148 quotes, including 123 at strong intensity - people are expressing serious anger and dissatisfaction today.

• The frustration score of 61.8 sits in the middle range for this period but represents a notable jump from yesterday's 52.9.

• Fears rebounded sharply from yesterday's low with 50 quotes (23 strong), while optimism turned negative after yesterday's brief uptick.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
